caption: Ever look in your fridge and see nothing but eggs and bread? 😅 Don't panic! We've rounded up 5 delicious meals you can make with just these two pantry staples. From classic French toast to savory bread strata, you'll be amazed at what you can create! 👨‍🍳 Want more recipe ideas that save you money and time? Download Peppera today and transform your cooking game! #DownloadPeppera
hooks: Running low on groceries? We've got you covered!
When your fridge is empty but your stomach isn't...
Pantry crisis? More like pantry opportunity!
platform_notes: Use carousel format for the 8 slides with engaging 2D cartoon illustrations. Ensure text is large and clear for mobile viewing. Consider adding polls in Stories to engage with audience about their favorite egg and bread combinations.

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

slides.title: 5 Meals From Just Eggs & Bread
slides.image_prompt: A friendly cartoon pepper character with a chef's hat and apron, holding a cooking utensil, animated expression, looking excited, pointing to eggs and bread on a kitchen counter, 2D cartoon illustration style, bright colors

slides.title: When Your Pantry Looks Empty
slides.image_prompt: A friendly cartoon pepper character with a chef's hat and apron, holding a cooking utensil, animated expression, looking worried at nearly empty kitchen shelves with only eggs and bread visible, 2D cartoon illustration style

slides.title: Classic French Toast
slides.image_prompt: Cartoon illustration of French toast with maple syrup on a plate, with ingredients (eggs, bread) visible, 2D cartoon illustration style

ingredients: Maple syrup or sugar for serving
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a bowl
Dip each bread slice in the mixture
Melt butter in pan over medium heat
Cook each slice for 2-3 minutes per side until golden
recipe.proTip: Day-old bread works best as it absorbs the egg mixture better

slides.title: Simple Bread Pudding
slides.image_prompt: Cartoon illustration of bread pudding with a spoon, showing a baked dish with bread cubes in egg mixture, 2D cartoon illustration style

steps: Preheat oven to 180°C
Mix eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt
Add bread cubes and let soak for 10 minutes
Pour into buttered dish and bake for 35-40 minutes until set
recipe.proTip: Stale bread makes the best bread pudding as it absorbs the custard better

slides.title: Egg-in-a-Hole
slides.image_prompt: Cartoon illustration of egg-in-a-hole (toad in a hole) on a frying pan, with eggs frying inside bread circles, 2D cartoon illustration style

steps: Cut a hole in the center of each bread slice
Melt butter in pan over medium heat
Place bread in pan and crack egg into each hole
Cook for 2-3 minutes, then flip and cook until done to your liking
recipe.proTip: Use a cookie cutter or glass to make perfect circles in the bread

slides.title: Savoury Bread Strata
slides.image_prompt: Cartoon illustration of a savory bread strata in a baking dish, with visible layers of bread, cheese, and egg mixture, 2D cartoon illustration style

steps: Grease a baking dish
Layer bread cubes, cheese, and onions
Whisk eggs, milk, salt, and pepper
Pour over bread mixture and bake at 180°C for 45 minutes
recipe.proTip: Let it sit for 10 minutes after baking before cutting for cleaner slices

slides.title: Quick Bread Omelette
slides.image_prompt: Cartoon illustration of a bread omelette on a plate, showing a folded omelette with visible bread pieces and cheese, 2D cartoon illustration style

steps: Tear bread into small pieces
Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper
Melt butter in pan, add bread pieces and sauté for 2 minutes
Pour egg mixture over bread and cook until almost set, then add cheese and fold
recipe.proTip: For extra protein, add leftover cooked meat or vegetables if available
